1797570.name: Quest for the Pinnacle
1797570.description:
Screenshots are of a work-in-progress.

Ask, learn, and fight!

Talk to people, read signs, and find other ways to learn about the world.

Use knowledge you gain to talk to people giving access to new understanding, new places, and new techniques.
Fight using the things that you learn on your adventure to reach new heights!

Your group's escape begins with deciding who stays behind!

Choose your own unique band of refugees giving each playthrough a different experience.

At the start of your journey your group's homeland is being attacked by a legendary beast!
You must divide the town into a party of refugees and a party to fight the attacker.

Seek help from Pinnacle for your homeland!

Take the refugees on a journey to find help.

What your party learns and who comes along will change a lot about what's to come.
Will they reach Pinnacle?

Features

  • Turn-based RPG combat with a unique twist.
  • Learn words and use them for advancing the plot, to find new things, and even in combat.
  • Create a unique party of 1 to 8 people of 9, leaving at least one behind!
  • A story of survival and personal growth.
  • A unique visual style that pops.
